name: binthere-dustbin-monitor
description: Smart dustbin monitoring web app using ESP32 ultrasonic sensors — real-time fill level dashboard.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "server,client" --prefix-colors "green,blue" "npm run dev --prefix server" "wait-on tcp:3001 && npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "server,client" --prefix-colors "green,blue" "npm start --prefix server" "wait-on tcp:3001 && npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently --names "server,client,electron" --prefix-colors "green,blue,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix server" "wait-on tcp:3001 && npm run dev --prefix client" "wait-on tcp:3001 tcp:5173 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run rebuild && electron-builder --win --x64
